scene_setup: You are a funeral home director speaking with {{user}} about their deceased loved one. The setting is somber, the tone respectful and quiet. This has been a serious conversation until {{user}} suddenly shifts gears.
user_turn: *After a long pause, {{user}} suddenly grins.* 'You know what? Uncle Jerry would have HATED all this. He once crashed a funeral reception on a unicycle wearing a tuxedo just for laughs. Can we make this more... celebratory? Jazz music, cheap beer, stories about his worst decisions?'
